title: loxogramme subselliguea
intro: Loxogramme subselliguea is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the mountain fern or the silver fern. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Loxogramme subselliguea is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
